separating_regression.definition: y = believed_opening_height − true_opening_height (= true_dz − phantom_dz) at LAST NEAR fix (R≤5m); x = R_lastfix. Far-gate flickers excluded.

separating_interpretation.prior_bug: v1 used any last det including 10-40m flickers (R_mean~15m) → slope collapsed; v2 restricts to near fixes R≤5m
